# Descriptor Docs

- [`DESCRIPTOR_REFCOUNTING_VERIFIED.md`](./DESCRIPTOR_REFCOUNTING_VERIFIED.md): matches current `kc_desc.c` behaviour.
- [`DESCRIPTOR_REFCOUNTING_FUTURE.md`](./DESCRIPTOR_REFCOUNTING_FUTURE.md): ideas and open questions for the descriptor subsystem.

Reach for the verified doc when you need the ground truth; jot down experiments in the future doc so we keep the intent clear.
